scripts.build: npm run build -w @aci/domain && npm run build -w @aci/connectors && npm run build -w @aci/ai && npm run build -w @aci/reporting && npm run build -w @aci/api && npm run build -w @aci/worker && npm run build -w @aci/web
scripts.lint: npm run typecheck -w @aci/domain && npm run typecheck -w @aci/connectors && npm run typecheck -w @aci/ai && npm run typecheck -w @aci/reporting && npm run typecheck -w @aci/api && npm run typecheck -w @aci/worker && npm run typecheck -w @aci/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @aci/domain && npm run test -w @aci/connectors && npm run test -w @aci/ai && npm run test -w @aci/reporting && npm run test -w @aci/web
